svg.text: 14.16 · The master cheat-sheet — the whole journey, one page of recall
M01–M13 condensed · the page you recall under pressure (incident or interview)
★ THE MONEY SETTINGS (money-never-lies)
money type → DECIMAL / integer minor units (NEVER FLOAT)
durability → flush_log_at_trx_commit=1 + sync_binlog=1
replication → semi-sync (monitored) + ROW format + GTID
distributed → idempotency keys + outbox/CDC + reconciliation
transfer → single-shard ACID (co-locate) + atomic debit=credit
the non-negotiables for not losing money
DEFAULTS / NUMBERS TO KNOW
engine = InnoDB · isolation = REPEATABLE READ
buffer pool ≈ 70–80% of RAM (the biggest lever, M09)
binlog = ROW · GTID = ON · connection pool = small
page = 16KB · clustered PK = the table (M05)
MVCC = consistent reads · undo = version chains (M08)
redo = WAL (durability) · binlog = replication/PITR/CDC
DECISION ONE-LINERS
which index → (=cols, range, sort); covering if hot (M05)
which isolation → weakest-correct; money = RR + FOR UPDATE
scale → up → replicas → partition → SHARD (shard last)
distributed → co-locate → Saga → idempotency → outbox/CDC → reconcile
durability → 1/1 for money; group commit amortizes (M09)
is MySQL right? → ACID OLTP yes; analytics/search/KV → derive via CDC
TRIAGE ENTRY POINTS
replica lag → 14.6 (parallel apply, slow query, long txn)
deadlock → 14.4 (lock order, retry victim, SKIP LOCKED)
blocked? → 14.5 (lock-wait vs deadlock vs MDL stall)
slow query → 14.7 (slow log → digest → EXPLAIN → fix)
LOST DATA → 14.8 → M15 (CONTAIN → recover → VERIFY)
matrices: isolation×anomaly (14.3) · durability (14.9) · force-recovery (M15)
THE FOUR THREADS (the lenses running through everything)
DURABILITY ("what survives a crash?") · MONEY-NEVER-LIES ("did money get lost/duplicated?")
GENERICS-FIRST (the agnostic principle before the MySQL specifics) · TRADEOFF (nothing is free)
THE JOURNEY: model (M01–M03) → optimize (M04–M06) → ACID/MVCC/durability (M07–M09)
→ replicate/shard/distribute (M10–M12) → operate (M13) → triage (M14) → fail-safely (M15) → fintech capstone (M16)
single-node correct → durable → node-loss-durable → write-scaled → distributed-correct → operable → recoverable → money-never-lies
